attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT   
1 AS BATCH_ID,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.DEAL_ID as DEAL_ID ,
COALESCE(CQ_APPR_ROUTE.OBJECT_ID, -999) as OBJECT_ID,
COALESCE(CQ_APPR_ROUTE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID,-999) as DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.APPROVER_ROLE as APPROVER_ROLE,
COALESCE(CQ_APPR_ROUTE.QUEUE_SEQ, -999) as QUEUE_SEQ,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.APPROVER_ID as  APPROVER_ID,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.DECISION as DECISION,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.APPROVER_COMMENTS as APPROVER_COMMENTS,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.SUBMITTED_DATE as SUBMITTED_DATE,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.DECISION_DATE as DECISION_DATE,
COALESCE(CQ_APPR_ROUTE.CREATED_ON, CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) as CREATED_ON,
COALESCE(CQ_APPR_ROUTE.CREATED_BY, 'UNKNOWN') as CREATED_BY,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.UPDATED_ON as UPDATED_ON,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.UPDATED_BY as UPDATED_BY,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.SUBMITTED_BY as SUBMITTED_BY,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.APPR_GROUP_TYPE as APPR_GROUP_TYPE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as DM_UPDATE_DATE,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.TOTAL_DEAL_EFF_DISC as TOTAL_DEAL_EFF_DISC,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.TOTAL_DEAL_NET_PRICE as TOTAL_DEAL_NET_PRICE,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.PRODUCT_EFF_DISC as PRODUCT_EFF_DISC,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.SERVICE_EFF_DISC as SERVICE_EFF_DISC,
'UNKNOWN' AS USER_ROLE_CD,
'N' as RETURN_TO_ME_FLAG,
'UNKNOWN' AS USER_ROLE,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.THEATER as THEATER,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.QUEUE_STATUS as QUEUE_STATUS,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.ACTIVE as ACTIVE,
'N' AS  EDIT_QUESTIONAIRE_FLAG,
'UNKNOWN' as APPROVAL_TYPE,
-999 as PRECEDENCE,                                 
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.SOURCE as SOURCE,
'N' as AM_OPTIONAL,
-999 AS APPROVAL_CYCLE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0) as REMINDER_SENT_DATE,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.DECISION_SOURCE as DECISION_SOURCE,
-999 as APPR_TEAM_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS APPR_TEAM_NAME,
'N' as CAN_MODIFY_DISCOUNT_LIMIT,    
'N' as DYNAMIC_APPROVAL_CHAIN_FLAG,
'N' as CAN_DELETE_APPR_FLAG,
'N' as CAN_MODIFY_DISCOUNT,
CQ_APPR_ROUTE.XAAS_EFF_DISC as XAAS_EFF_DISC,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
COALESCE(ICD.DM_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS DM_UPDATE_DATE1,
CASE WHEN CQ_APPR_ROUTE.SS_CODE = 'CCWQUOTING' THEN 'CCW' WHEN CQ_APPR_ROUTE.SS_CODE ='CCWR' THEN 'CCWR' ELSE CQ_APPR_ROUTE.SS_CODE END AS SS_CODE
FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_CQ_APPR_ROUTE AS CQ_APPR_ROUTE 
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_DEAL ICD
ON ICD.OBJECT_ID = CQ_APPR_ROUTE.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
WHERE CQ_APPR_ROUTE.EDW_CREATE_DTM >=  (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS where JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_ST_CQ_APPR_ROUTE')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by CQ_APPR_ROUTE.DEAL_ID, CQ_APPR_ROUTE.OBJECT_ID order by CQ_APPR_ROUTE.OFFSET_NUMBER desc, CQ_APPR_ROUTE.EDW_CREATE_DTM desc)=1
